creator: j.kossen@home.nl
text:
On Fri, Sep 14, 2001 at 06:04:52PM -0700, Jim Mock wrote:
 > On Sun, 09 Sep 2001 at 21:59:06 +0200, Jochem Kossen wrote:
 > > 
 > > >Submitter-Id:	current-users
 > > >Originator:	Jochem Kossen
 > > >Organization:	
 > > >Confidential:	no
 > > >Synopsis:	pkg_plist of net/gaim incorrectly specified
 > > >Severity:	serious
 > > >Priority:	medium
 > > >Category:	ports
 > > >Class:		sw-bug
 > > >Release:	FreeBSD 4.4-RC i386
 > > >Environment:
 > > System: FreeBSD lisa 4.4-RC FreeBSD 4.4-RC #0: Fri Sep 7 23:49:53 CEST 2001 jochem@lisa:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/LISA i386
 > > >Description:
 > > 	either pkg_plist of net/gaim (version 0.43) is incorrectly specified, or the files are installed
 > > 	in an incorrect directory. When i do a 'make deinstall', for all the pixmaps, i get these kind of errors:
 > > 
 > > 	pkg_delete: file `/usr/X11R6/share/gnome/pixmaps/gaim/cancel.xpm' doesn't really exist
 > > 
 > > 	The pixmaps are actually installed in /usr/X11R6/share/pixmaps/gaim/
 > > >How-To-Repeat:
 > > 	cd /usr/ports/net/gaim && make install && make deinstall
 > > >Fix:
 > 
 > Hmm.  I can't replicate this.  Do you have any GNOME bits installed at
 > all (if your answer to this is yes, then it will build with GNOME
 > support).  I'm guessing it's something GNOME-related, but not having a
 > box with GNOME on it doesn't leave me with much more than guesses...
 > 
 > - jim
 
 Weird. I must have been drunk or something. I'm positive that the
 missing pixmaps files were due to my own faults. I can't replicate it
 either anymore. At least, not for the pixmaps.
 
 I have gnomecore installed, as well as a number of other gnome packages.
 When i do a make install, and then a make deinstall in
 /usr/ports/net/gaim, these are the error messages:
 
 ===>  Deinstalling for gaim-gnome-0.43
 pkg_delete: file `/usr/X11R6/share/locale/de/LC_MESSAGES/gaim.mo'
 doesn't really exist
 pkg_delete: file `/usr/X11R6/share/locale/es/LC_MESSAGES/gaim.mo'
 doesn't really exist
 pkg_delete: file `/usr/X11R6/share/locale/fr/LC_MESSAGES/gaim.mo'
 doesn't really exist
 pkg_delete: file `/usr/X11R6/share/locale/ko/LC_MESSAGES/gaim.mo'
 doesn't really exist
 pkg_delete: file `/usr/X11R6/share/locale/zh_CN/LC_MESSAGES/gaim.mo'
 doesn't really exist
 pkg_delete: couldn't entirely delete package (perhaps the packing list
 is
 incorrectly specified?)
 pkg_delete: couldn't open dependency file
 `/var/db/pkg/imake-4.1.0/+REQUIRED_BY'pkg_delete: couldn't open
 dependency file `/var/db/pkg/freetype2-2.0.4/+REQUIRED_BY'
 pkg_delete: couldn't open dependency file
 `/var/db/pkg/XFree86-libraries-4.1.0/+REQUIRED_BY'
 
 This is without modifying the Makefile, and it IS replicatable.
 
 --
    Jochem
